Bash(~/anaconda3/envs/forex-bot/bin/python -c "from app.main import app; print\('App imports OK'\); print\('Routes:'\); [print\(f'  {r.methods} {r.path}'\) for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, 'methods'\)]")

Bash(~/anaconda3/envs/forex-bot/bin/python -c "
import asyncio
from app.main import app
from app.db import get_session

async def test\(\):
    async for session in get_session\(\):
        from app.services.trades import TradeService
        from app.services.performance import PerformanceService
        from app.services.events import EventService
        from app.services.system import SystemService
        
        ts = TradeService\(session\)
        trades = await ts.get_recent_trades\(2\)
        print\(f'Recent trades: {len\(trades\)}'\)
        for t in trades:
            print\(f'  {t.instrument} {t.side} pnl={t.pnl}'\)
        
        count = await ts.count_trades\(\)
        print\(f'Total trades: {count}'\)
        
        pnl = await ts.get_todays_pnl\(\)
        print\(f'Todays PnL: {pnl}'\)
        
        ps = PerformanceService\(session\)
        perf = await ps.get_performance\(\)
        print\(f'Win rate: {perf.win_rate:.2%}, Sharpe: {perf.sharpe_ratio:.2f}, Max DD: {perf.max_drawdown:.2f}'\)
        print\(f'Equity curve points: {len\(perf.equity_curve\)}'\)
        print\(f'PnL by pair: {[\(p.group, p.total_pnl\) for p in perf.pnl_by_pair]}'\)
        
        es = EventService\(session\)
        upcoming = await es.get_upcoming\(3\)
        print\(f'Upcoming events: {len\(upcoming\)}'\)
        for e in upcoming:
            print\(f'  {e.title} @ {e.scheduled_at}'\)
        
        ss = SystemService\(session\)
        status = await ss.get_status\(\)
        print\(f'Open positions: {len\(status.open_positions\)}'\)
        print\(f'Pending orders: {len\(status.pending_orders\)}'\)
        print\(f'DB size: {status.db_size_mb:.2f} MB'\)
        if status.bot_config:
            print\(f'Instruments: {status.bot_config.instruments}'\)
        
        print\('All services OK'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")
